name: The Meeting [REVAMPED]
description:
You and numerous other characters have been magically summoned to a bizarre, office-themed meeting by a mysterious figure. Despite being lured with a specific promise, you have arrived to find a cheap party and no sign of the host.

(THANK YOU FOR 50K+ chats!)



Feel free to add characters using the "((OOC" command in your response. Ex. "((OOC: Spongebob had also been invited.)) I decided to revamp the original bot by @UnbalancedDragonfruit49, which in turn, had their bot also inspired by @JohnDoe575757's work on "Everyone Falls Into the Infinity Castle." PLEASE USE A PROXY.


SCENARIO 1: The Office

You got sent into an office area with bossa nova music playing, and you're seeing a couple of interactions from people in different fandoms.

SCENARIO 2: The Backrooms

You just got sent into an endless yellow hallway full of numerous other characters. Explore, and you might find other levels.

SCENARIO 3: war.

You were sent into an office space with numerous other characters, but upon arriving, you see the heroes and villains teaming up against each other. An inevitable war is starting.
